TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ciusinlun ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 55 buwan, 137 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 133 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 96%, Cou 1%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciusinlun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Ciusinlun hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ciusinlun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ciusinlun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ciusinlun hya' ga Dai-ni. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨius~ɕinlun ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, ʦ~ʨou *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨius~ɕinlun ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨius~ɕinlun ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨius~ɕinlun ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨius~ɕinlun ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨius~ɕinlun ħjaʔ ɣa *ai-ni. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Ciusinlun ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 55 buwan, 137 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 133 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 4 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 96%, Cou 1%, Paywan 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciusinlun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Ciusinlun hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Ciusinlun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ciusinlun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Ciusinlun hya' ga Dai-ni. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨius~ɕinlun ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, ʦ~ʨou *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨius~ɕinlun ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨius~ɕinlun ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨius~ɕinlun ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨius~ɕinlun ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨius~ɕinlun ħjaʔ ɣa *ai-ni. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
